title: urtica dioica var. lyallii
intro: Urtica dioica var. lyallii, also known as Lyall's nettle, is a subspecies of the common nettle plant, native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lyall's nettle include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Lyall's nettle can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
